nasb.text: They said, “Why, O Lord, God of Israel, has this come about in Israel, so that one tribe should be missing today in Israel?”

esv.text: And they said, “O Lord, the God of Israel, why has this happened in Israel, that today there should be one tribe lacking in Israel?”

cnv.text: 說：“耶和華以色列的　神啊，今日以色列中缺少了一個支派，為甚麼在以色列中發生這事呢？”

ccb.text: 他们说：“以色列的上帝耶和华啊，以色列为何少了一个支派呢？为何发生了这样的事呢？”
